SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2021 Continued To Jun-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steve Pedro for Plaintiff/Respondent party in pro per.
Patrick O'Donnell for Defendant/Appellant party in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for a trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Steve Pedro testifies on behalf of the plaintiff. The following exhibits are presented/reviewed:

Eviction Notice (returned)
Notice of eviction (retained)

Patrick O'Donnell testifies on behalf of defendant. The following exhibits are presented/reviewed:

30-Day notice to move out (returned)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Gerardo Sandoval, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D608)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
